segments.text: Mini Takur just became the youngest
member of parliament in India thanks to
her online content proving the creator
economy's power. She [music] built trust
long before entering politics through
her content. Praep Rangatan started with
short films on YouTube built a loyal
audience and today he is a celebrated
[music] actor and director in Tamil
cinema and that's the real shift
tomorrow. A completely regular person
working a normal job can [music] build
an online presence, create consistently
and open doors that once felt [music]
impossible. From a corporate employee to
a filmmaker, politician, teacher,
[music] athlete or entrepreneur, content
is now the shortcut to opportunity,
influence and recognition. The Gen
cohort offers a structured 5-month
[music]
offline program in Bengaluru. Three
months of expert training and two months
of real world creation with mentors
[music] like Varun Maya and AVTV. You'll
learn everything from fundamentals to
advanced execution directly from top
[music] industry creators. If you're
dedicated to building for the internet,
check the link in bio for the sign
[music] up link and subscribe to full
disclosure for updates.
